app.name: ChordMiniApp
app.one_liner: An open-source music analysis web application for chord recognition, beat tracking, guitar/piano visualization, lyrics synchronization, and experimental melody transcription.

screens.name: Beat & Chord Analysis
screens.purpose: Display chord progression grid synchronized with beat detection, including Roman numeral analysis, key modulation signals, simplified notation, and song segmentation overlays.

screens.name: Guitar Chords
screens.purpose: Show interactive guitar chord diagrams with accurate fingering from @tombatossals/chords-db, supporting capo adjustment, label modes, and slash-chord matching.

screens.name: Homepage
screens.purpose: Provide entry point for YouTube search, URL input, and access to recent videos with clean, intuitive interface.

screens.name: Melody Transcription
screens.purpose: Provide experimental melody-to-sheet-music transcription with synchronized note rendering.

screens.name: Piano Visualizer
screens.purpose: Render real-time falling MIDI notes on an 88-key piano roll synchronized to chord playback, with scrolling chord strip and MIDI export capability.

rust_commands.name: detect_beats_and_chords
rust_commands.purpose: Run Madmom-based beat detection and harmonic analysis on uploaded audio or YouTube video to produce synchronized chord grid and structural segmentation.

rust_commands.name: export_midi
rust_commands.purpose: Generate and download a Standard MIDI Type 1 file containing instrument-specific voicing of detected chord progressions.

rust_commands.name: fetch_guitar_diagrams
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve accurate guitar chord shapes from @tombatossals/chords-db based on detected harmony, supporting inversions and capo adjustments.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build basic chord grid UI with playback sync
week 1: Implement core YouTube/audio ingestion pipeline
week 1: Integrate Madmom beat detection and chord recognition
week 2: Add guitar diagram integration using @tombatossals/chords-db
week 2: Enable chord simplification and enharmonic correction
week 2: Implement Roman numeral analysis toggle
week 3: Add MIDI export with instrument-specific voicing
week 3: Develop piano visualizer with falling notes and keyboard highlighting
week 4: Refine UI/UX across all tabs with Zustand state management
week 4: Stabilize CI/CD pipeline to resolve deployment failures
acceptance_tests: Guitar chord diagrams update accurately when capo position is changed and reflect slash chords when available in database.
MIDI export produces a valid Standard MIDI Type 1 file that imports correctly into major DAWs with proper instrument voicing.
Production deployment succeeds without errors across three consecutive commits.
User can input a YouTube URL and receive a synchronized chord progression grid with beat markers within 10 seconds.
